source_name: Code4rena Ethena Labs Findings and Analysis Report (2024-11) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_claim: There is no function available to transfer UStb from unwhitelisted users to whitelisted users.
why_it_looked_bad: The redistributeLockedAmount() function facilitates the transfer of UStb from a blacklisted user to an unblacklisted user. However, when the state is WHITELIST_ENABLED, there is no mechanism in place to transfer UStb from an unwhitelisted user to a whitelisted user.
why_not_valid: missing helper to move balances from unwhitelisted to whitelisted users is an operational limitation, not an exploitable invariant break by itself
downgrade_reason: missing helper to move balances from unwhitelisted to whitelisted users is an operational limitation, not an exploitable invariant break by itself
trust_assumption: Treat as a caution/false-positive reference unless the current target shows permissionless reachability, direct value loss, and concrete affected code path.
when_it_could_be_real: if combined with permissionless access or large-value state transitions
if the affected path becomes critical to mint/redeem/withdrawal solvency or availability
